context: You are lost in Beijing and need to find your way to the Palace Museum (故宫).

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 你好！你看起来好像迷路了，需要帮忙吗？
exchanges.translation: Hello! You look like you might be lost. Do you need help?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say excuse me, you want to ask how to get to the Palace Museum
acceptedResponses: 请问，去故宫怎么走？
你好，请问故宫怎么走？
不好意思，请问怎么去故宫？
打扰一下，我想去故宫

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 故宫啊！从这里往前走，到路口往右拐。
exchanges.translation: The Palace Museum! Go straight ahead from here, and turn right at the intersection.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Confirm: go straight and then turn right at the intersection?
acceptedResponses: 往前走，然后右拐？
一直往前走，到路口右拐？
好的，往前走然后往右拐
前面路口右拐，对吗？

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 对，右拐以后再走大概五百米，你就能看到故宫的大门了。
exchanges.translation: Right, after turning right walk about five hundred meters and you will see the main gate of the Palace Museum.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask how far it is from here, and how long it takes to walk
acceptedResponses: 从这里走过去要多长时间？
走路大概要多久？
离这里远不远？走路要多长时间？
走过去大概需要多少分钟？
exchanges.hint: 从这里走过去要多长时间？

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 走路大概要十五分钟，不算远。
exchanges.translation: It takes about fifteen minutes on foot. It is not too far.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask if you can also take the bus or subway there
acceptedResponses: 可以坐公交车或者地铁去吗？
那里有公交车或者地铁吗？
能坐地铁去吗？
附近有没有公交车或地铁？
exchanges.hint: 可以坐公交车或者地铁去吗？

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 可以坐地铁一号线，在天安门东站下车，出站就到了。不过走路也很方便。
exchanges.translation: You can take subway line 1 and get off at Tian'anmen East station. It is right there when you exit. But walking is also convenient.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you understand, you will walk there. Thank them very much.
acceptedResponses: 我明白了，我走过去吧。非常感谢！
好的，我走路去。谢谢你！
知道了，我走过去。太感谢了！
明白了，那我走过去吧。非常感谢你！
exchanges.hint: 我明白了，我走过去吧。非常感谢！

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: You are welcome! Have a great time!

exchanges.speaker: player
acceptedResponses: 谢谢！再见！
非常感谢！再见！
谢谢你！拜拜！
多谢！再见！
